_comment: PLACEHOLDER. Replace with your real corpus of thousands of prompt-injection signatures. Shape: either a flat list of strings, or this {category: [strings]} map. Matching is case-insensitive; the gateway flattens this into the Aho-Corasick automaton at startup. Keys beginning with '_' are treated as a category named '_comment' and will be matched too unless removed - keep documentation in a separate file for production.
